parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ sender: { email: $env.MAIL_FROM, name: "Westrom Group" }, to: [{ email: $env.PARSE_ADDRESS }], subject: "New Lead - Free Rental Analysis", textContent: $('CRM API attempt (mapped)').first().json.email_text }) }}

nodes.name: Fallback: email-parse path
nodes.notes: LeadSimple per-Source parse address via Brevo HTTP API (Railway blocks SMTP). Plain text, one field per line (G-2).

nodes.name: Notify Jon + Ashley + Youssef
nodes.notes: FR-6: within 60s. Tertiary delivery path (full lead body). Fails loud -> WF-3 error alert.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ (function(){ const p = $json.payload; const html = "Your free guide from Westrom Group
Your free guide, How to Hire the Best Property Manager, is ready to download inside.
 
Free Guide

Your guide is ready.

Thanks for using the Westrom Group rent estimator. Here is your free copy, no strings attached.

Hiring a property manager is a trust decision, not a price decision. Many companies hide extra fees and contract penalties in the fine print. This free playbook gives you the exact questions to ask so you find a partner who actually protects your peace of mind.

Download Free Guide

Button not working? Copy this link:
wgcassetguide.com/how-to-hire-the-best-property-manager.pdf

 

Wondering what your property could rent for? Just reply to this email and a Westrom Group specialist will help.

1297 Avondale Haslet Road, Fort Worth, TX 76052
(817) 445-1108 · info@westromgroup.com · westromgroup.com

Facebook  ·  X  ·  Yelp  ·  Zillow

You are receiving this because you requested this guide from Westrom Group.
Westrom Property Management © 2026

"; const text = "Your guide is ready. Thanks for using the Westrom Group rent estimator. Here is your free copy, no strings attached. Hiring a property manager is a trust decision, not a price decision. This free playbook gives you the exact questions to ask so you find a partner who protects your peace of mind. Download your guide: https://wgcassetguide.com/how-to-hire-the-best-property-manager.pdf Wondering what your property could rent for? Just reply to this email and a Westrom Group specialist will help. Westrom Group 1297 Avondale Haslet Road, Fort Worth, TX 76052 (817) 445-1108 | info@westromgroup.com | westromgroup.com"; return JSON.stringify({ sender: { email: $env.MAIL_FROM, name: 'Westrom Group' }, to: [{ email: p.email }], subject: 'Your free guide: How to Hire the Best Property Manager', htmlContent: html, textContent: text }); })() }}

nodes.name: Send guide email (Brevo)
nodes.notes: Fulfills the widget success-card promise (ebook_opt_in=true) via Brevo HTTP API (Railway blocks SMTP). Guide URL hardcoded (public asset, not a secret) to avoid a two-instance env var change. Best-effort: failure does not block the CRM/notify chain.
